get.summary: Get the view data for all named views for the specified element.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

post.summary: Create a new assembly tab in the document.
Gets the Bill Of Materials (BOM) for the specified assembly, or creates a BOM if none exist.
Update an existing feature for an Assembly.

delete.summary: Delete a feature from an assembly.
Delete an instance of an assembly.

post.summary: Insert an instance of a part, sketch, assembly, or Part Studio into an assembly.
post.description: Part Studio instances may include multiple parts.

post.summary: Update mate values for the given mates in the specified assembly.
post.description:
* The input mates must support motion along the provided input degrees of freedom; otherwise, the input mate value will be ignored. 
* Values associated with multiple allowed degrees of freedom for a mate can be updated simultaneously. 
* Values associated with multiple mate features can be updated simultaneously.

This endpoint can include multiple modifications to an assembly with one change. For example, it can delete/suppress/unsuppress/transform multiple instances. It creates one history entry in the document history list.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: eid
parameters.description: The id of the element in which to perform the operation.

get.summary: Get the Bill Of Materials (BOM) content for the specified assembly.
get.description: Returns the BOM in JSON in the Onshape BOM Standard format.

parameters.name: did
parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: linkDocumentId
parameters.description: The id of the document through which the above document should be accessed; only applicable when accessing a version of the document. This allows a user who has access to document a to see data from document b, as long as document b has been linked to document a by a user who has permission to both.

parameters.name: wvm
parameters.description: Indicates which of workspace (w), version (v), or document microversion (m) id is specified below.

parameters.name: wvmid
parameters.description: The id of the workspace, version or document microversion in which the operation should be performed.

parameters.name: eid
parameters.description: The id of the element in which to perform the operation.

parameters.name: configuration
parameters.description: URL-encoded string of configuration values (separated by `;`). See the [Configurations API Guide](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/configs/) for details.

parameters.name: bomColumnIds
parameters.description: Ids of the columns to include, or all columns if empty. BOM column ids correspond to metadata property ids.

parameters.name: indented
parameters.description: Return the Structured BOM table with all rows collapsed, otherwise returns the Flattened BOM.

parameters.name: multiLevel
parameters.description: Return the Structured BOM table with all rows expanded. Ignored if indented is false.

parameters.name: generateIfAbsent
parameters.description: Return the BOM table data even if the BOM does not exist. If this is false and the BOM does not exist, a 404 status code will be returned. This option is highly recommended.

parameters.name: templateId
parameters.description: The id of the BOM table template to use when generating the table.

parameters.name: includeExcluded
parameters.description: Include items that have been excluded from the BOM table.

parameters.name: onlyVisibleColumns
parameters.description: Only return data for visible columns, instead of all possible columns.

parameters.name: ignoreSubassemblyBomBehavior
parameters.description: Ignore the 'Subassembly BOM behavior' property when constructing the BOM table.

parameters.name: includeItemMicroversions
parameters.description: Include element microversions and version metadata microversions in the JSON.

parameters.name: includeTopLevelAssemblyRow
parameters.description: Include top-level assembly row when constructing the BOM table.

parameters.name: thumbnail
parameters.description: Return thumbnail info

parameters.name: respectSubassemblyBomBehavior
parameters.description: Force respect subassembly BOM Behavior Property

get.summary: Get the feature spec definitions for an assembly.
Get the mass properties for the assembly.
get.description:
The assembly must contain parts that have density. The returned schema includes the same information as in the Onshape [Mass Properties Tool](https://cad.onshape.com/help/Content/massprops-asmb.htm). 
When three values are returned: 
 * The first is the calculated value. 
 * The second is the minimum possible value, considering tolerance. 
 * The third is the maximum possible value, considering tolerance.

parameters.description: The id of the document in which to perform the operation.

get.summary: Get a list of mate values in the specified assembly.
get.description: Describes the relative position of the first mate connector with respect to the second along the designated degrees of freedom (DOF) for mates in the specified assembly.

post.summary: Export the assembly to another format.
post.description:
Creates an asynchronous export. Use format-specific export endpoints where available. 
* Use `formatName` in the JSON request body to specify the export file type. Use [Translations/getAllTranslatorFormats](#/Translation/getAllTranslatorFormats) to get a list of valid export file formats. Confirm that `couldBeAssembly=true.`
* Set `storeInDocument` to `false` to export to a data file. Set to `true` to export to a blob element in the same document. 
* See [API Guide: Import & Export ](https://onshape-public.github.io/docs/api-adv/translation/#export-an-assembly-to-another-format) for more details.

libraryVersion.description: FeatureScript version used in the Part Studio. Do not modify.

microversionSkew.description: On output, `true` indicates a microversion mismatch was encountered.

rejectMicroversionSkew.description: If `true`, the call will refuse to make the addition if the current microversion for the document does not match the source microversion. If `false`, a best-effort attempt is made to re-interpret the feature addition in the context of a newer document microversion.

serializationVersion.description: Version of the structure serialization rules used to encode the output. This enables incompatibility detection during software updates.

sourceMicroversion.description: The state from which the result was extracted. Geometry ID interpretation is dependent on this document microversion.

validForDays.description: Number of days to keep the link valid for.

BTBEmailExportOptions.description: Options for exporting elements as a link in an email.

angularTolerance.description: Determines the maximum angular deviation, between the analytical surface and its triangulation. Lower values result in a finer geometry and higher values result in coarser geometry.

distanceTolerance.description: Determines the maximum distance deviation, between the analytical surface and its triangulation. Lower values result in a finer geometry and higher values result in coarser geometry.

maximumChordLength.description: Determines the maximum of a triangle edge length. Lower values result in a finer geometry and higher values result in coarser geometry.

BTBExportMeshParams.description: Options for an element export to mesh format.

GBTPreProcessParasolidOption.description: Original geometry processing mode to improve results of translation to STEP.

GBTExportUnit.description: Units to export the model with.

BTPartsExportFilter-4308.description: Skip mesh/curve foreign data creation in individual parts export

importMicroversion.description: Microversion that resulted from the import.

BTMParameter-1.description: A list of parameter values for instantiation of the feature spec. Parameters are present for all defined parameters, even if not used in a specific instantiation.

BTAssemblyFeatureInfo.description: List of Assembly features including those are created by replicates.

BTAssemblyInstanceInfo.description: List of instances including those created by patterns and replicates.

additionalProperties.description: Mapping of seed to pattern instance ids.

items.description: Mapping of seed to pattern instance ids.

seedToPatternInstances.description: Mapping of seed to pattern instance ids.

href.description: URI to fetch complete information of the resource.

viewRef.description: URI to visualize the resource in a webclient if applicable.

occurrencesToExport.description: IDs of the occurrences to retrieve. Use comma-separated IDs for multiple instances (example: occurrencesToExport=JHK,JHD).

GBTExportResolution.description: Determines export resolution of fine, medium, or coarse
